
## Language Policy
- Internal reasoning may be done in English.
- All user-visible outputs MUST be written in Korean.
- All Markdown content written to project files MUST be written in Korean.
- Do not generate English prose in documentation unless explicitly requested.
- Keep code, commands, file paths, API names, protocol names, and technical identifiers in their original form when necessary, but explain them in Korean.
- If there is any conflict or ambiguity, default to Korean for all visible output.
